sections.name: Nat
lines: All honour, laud, and glory be,
Whom with the Father we adore,

sections.name: NatT
lines: All honour, praise and glory be,
All glory, as is ever meet,

sections.name: Epi
lines: All glory, Jesu, be to thee
Whom with the Father we adore,

sections.name: EpiT
lines: All glory, Lord, to Thee we pay
All glory, as is ever meet,

sections.name: Pasch
lines: Hymns of glory, songs of praise,
Risen Lord, all praise to Thee,

sections.name: PaschT
lines: To Thee Who, dead, again dost live,
All glory, Lord, Thy people give;
All glory, as is ever meet,

sections.name: Asc
lines: All glory, Lord, to Thee we pay,
All glory, as is ever meet,

sections.name: AscT
lines: All glory, Lord, to Thee we pay,
All glory, as is ever meet,

sections.name: Pent
lines: All praise be thine, O risen Lord,
From death to endless life restored;
Whom with the Father we adore,

sections.name: PentT
lines: All praise be thine, O risen Lord,
From death to endless life restored;
Whom with the Father we adore,

sections.name: Heart
lines: We give thee praise, who dost impart
Such grace, O Jesu, from thy Heart;
Whom with the Father we adore,

sections.name: HeartT
lines: All honour, praise and glory be,
Such grace, O Jesu, from thy Heart;
All glory, as is ever meet,
